evals.prompt: Download videos from this Bilibili channel: https://space.bilibili.com/123456789
evals.expected_output: Skill should ask clarifying questions about scope (all videos vs first page) and which browser to use, then provide appropriate yt-dlp command with anti-bot protection

evals.prompt: I want to download all videos from my Bilibili Favorites
evals.expected_output: Skill should explain that Favorites requires authentication via browser cookies, ask which browser, and provide command with favorites URL format

evals.prompt: Download just this one video: https://www.bilibili.com/video/BV1test456
evals.expected_output: Skill should provide single video download command without playlist/archive options, simpler than bulk download
